elements.title: Yaxté totem pole
elements.contents: ... that the Yaxté totem pole (detail pictured) has survived being shot at, set on fire, and pecked by woodpeckers?

elements.title: coordinated harassment against a Chinese diver
elements.contents: ... that a private WeChat group coordinated harassment against a Chinese diver, including a rule that banned personal attacks on everyone except her?

elements.title: Quicksilver
elements.contents: ... that a rights dispute meant that two different actors played Quicksilver in two competing film franchises at the same time?

elements.title: Apocalypse
elements.contents: ... that the 1994 video game Apocalypse, about combat helicopter operations, also involves transporting medical personnel and evacuating the wounded?

elements.title: Momoko Seto
elements.contents: ... that Momoko Seto said that she received her first voice-acting role after only four months of training?

elements.title: Ballymun United
elements.contents: ... that a rare plant blocked Ballymun United from building more pitches?

elements.title: Sergey Androsenko
elements.contents: ... that gay rights activist Sergey Androsenko sued the Belarusian government over his arrest and beating at the 2010 Minsk Pride?

elements.title: Cold War 1994
elements.contents: ... that the lead actor of Cold War 1994 said he almost got hit by a plane during its filming?
